    STATEMENT: Rendered Memory Context shall be identified as supporting context and shall not override the current user task or explicit current constraints.
    GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF-MODE
    13.7. ActiveBrief Projection Mode Dependency
    UID: GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-ACTIVEBRIEF-MODE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Final ActiveBrief inclusion shall follow the deterministic final_prompt_mode and relation decision prepared by 30_preprocessing_prompt_functions.sdoc rather than being independently reclassified by MemoryMerge.
    GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION
    13.8. Memory Context Permission Dependency
    UID: GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION AC: Memory Permission
    STATEMENT: Memory synthesis and final projection shall honor PreProcessing allow_memory_context and memory_context_policy; a request with memory context disabled shall not receive synthesized memory_context_text.
    GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-DOC-MUTATION
    13.9. No Document Context Mutation
    UID: GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-DOC-MUTATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Memory synthesis and handoff shall not overwrite document S_CTX_MD, document stage views, or document selection IDs.
    GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-STAGE-CLAIM
    13.10. No Independent Pipeline Stage Claim
    UID: GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-STAGE-CLAIM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current MemoryMerge write-back shall not claim a separate top-level document pipeline stage solely because compression and synthesis occur inside MemoryRetriever.run.
    GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST
    13.11. No Runtime Context Persistence
    UID: GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY AC: Runtime Artifact Non-Persistence
    STATEMENT: memory_context_text, synthesis diagnostics, compressed episodic fields, and MemoryContextPack shall remain run-local artifacts and shall not be appended to .ragmem as new durable truth.

    14. 14. Configuration Governance and Current Consumption

    STATEMENT: Current memory transformation behavior combines versioned runtime JSON, versioned agent JSON, and some Python defaults; requirements distinguish consumed settings from merely present values.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-RUNTIME
    14.1. Runtime Configuration Source
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-RUNTIME
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Normal application startup shall load ragstream/config/runtime_config.json and shall pass the resulting dictionary into MemoryRetriever and its retrieval-time compressor and synthesizer components.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LOAD
    14.2. Recording-Time ActiveBrief Configuration Load
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LOAD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: The current recording-time ActiveBrief builder, when created by MemoryManager without explicit configuration, shall load ragstream/config/runtime_config.json through its own configuration loader.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-REDUCER
    14.3. Consumed ActiveBrief Reducer Settings
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-REDUCER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume reducer max_tokens_total, question_max_tokens, window size, window overlap, redundancy threshold, and embedding model.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-GATE
    14.4. Consumed ActiveBrief Gate Settings
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-GATE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume gate enabled, activebrief_threshold, and pending_topic_threshold.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LLM
    14.5. Consumed ActiveBrief LLM Settings
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-ACTIVE-LLM
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current ActiveBrief generation shall consume agent_id, init agent version, update agent version, target_brief_tokens, and prompt_cache_key from the ActiveBrief LLM configuration section.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-COMPRESS
    14.6. Consumed Compression Settings
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-COMPRESS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current runtime compression shall consume effective-query token limit and embedding model plus episodic enablement, total budget, question budget, window size, overlap, and redundancy threshold.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-SYNTH
    14.7. Consumed Synthesis Settings
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-SYNTH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Current MemoryMergeSynthesizer shall consume enabled, agent identity/version, target context tokens, episodic cap, semantic chunk cap, and prompt-cache key.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-AGENT-AUTHORITY
    14.8. Agent Definition Authority
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-AGENT-AUTHORITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Provider, model, temperature, provider maximum output tokens, dynamic bindings, static rules, and structured output schema shall remain owned by the corresponding versioned agent JSON definitions.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE
    14.9. No Hidden Configuration Override
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
    STATEMENT: A Python fallback value shall not be represented as JSON-controlled when the active runtime does not read the corresponding JSON field.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-MIGRATION
    14.10. Operational Parameter Migration
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-MIGRATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Remaining tunable thresholds, token budgets, model identifiers, window parameters, and evidence caps shall be kept or migrated into validated versioned JSON rather than multiplied as unrelated hard-coded runtime values.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-VALIDATION
    14.11. Configuration Validation Requirement
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-VALIDATION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Configuration loading shall reject or explicitly normalize invalid negative budgets, invalid window relationships, invalid threshold ranges, and missing required agent identities before those values silently alter memory behavior.

    15. 15. Error Handling, Logging, and Quality Requirements

    STATEMENT: The memory transformation path must preserve durable truth and expose decisions without leaking full memory content by default.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-DURABLE
    15.1. Transformation Failure Does Not Rewrite Truth
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-DURABLE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: A reducer, relevance-gate, ActiveBrief agent, compressor, or synthesis failure shall not rewrite prior .ragmem records, .ragmeta.json metadata, SQLite rows, or stored vectors.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-EMPTY
    15.2. Empty Runtime Result Is Explicit
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-EMPTY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: A skipped or failed synthesis shall return empty memory_context with diagnostics rather than an ambiguous fabricated success.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-ACTIVE
    15.3. ActiveBrief Error Visibility
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ERROR-ACTIVE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: ActiveBrief builder failures shall be available to explicitly enabled developer logging even though current MemoryManager capture continues.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-PUBLIC
    15.4. Public Logging Boundary
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-PUBLIC
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Public logs shall not expose complete memory Q/A bodies, ActiveBrief bodies, synthesis evidence, provider messages, raw model output, or embedding vectors by default.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-DEVELOPER
    15.5. Developer Diagnostic Boundary
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-DEVELOPER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Complete reduction, gate, agent payload, raw response, and synthesis snapshots shall remain behind explicitly enabled confidential developer logging.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-GATE
    15.6. Gate Log Summaries
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-LOG-GATE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: The gate log view shall report score summaries, counts, routes, and bounded text previews and shall not require full vector values.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-DETERMINISTIC-TEST
    15.7. Deterministic Component Testability
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-DETERMINISTIC-TEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Sentence splitting, window formation, token allocation, centroid, cosine, redundancy filtering, top-score count, threshold routing, contributor merging, query reduction, and evidence formatting shall be independently testable.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-TEST
    15.8. Agent Contract Testability
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AGENT-TEST
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: ActiveBrief and Memory Context agent definitions shall be testable for declared bindings, output fields, no-answer behavior, and rejection of undeclared output structure.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-REPRODUCIBILITY
    15.9. Decision Reproducibility
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-REPRODUCIBILITY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: Diagnostics shall preserve configuration version or effective values, route, thresholds, selected counts, contributor IDs, and agent identity sufficiently to reproduce a transformation decision.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-OUTSIDE-KNOWLEDGE
    15.10. No Outside Knowledge in Memory Artifacts
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-OUTSIDE-KNOWLEDGE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: ActiveBrief and Memory Context outputs shall be grounded in supplied memory evidence and shall not add external facts solely from model knowledge.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-SEMANTIC-GUARANTEE
    15.11. LLM Compression Nature
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-NO-SEMANTIC-GUARANTEE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: An LLM-produced ActiveBrief or memory_context shall be treated as a compressed runtime artifact and shall not be represented as a verbatim or complete copy of all source evidence.

    16. 16. Blackboard and Future Development Boundary

    STATEMENT: The filename reserves an architectural boundary for future coordination, but the current implementation does not contain a Blackboard subsystem.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED
    16.1. No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT MemoryContextPack Is Not Blackboard
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT SuperPrompt Extras Are Not Blackboard
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT Pending Topic State Is Not Blackboard
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND No Background Coordination Agents
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH No Current Knowledge Graph
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE No Knowledge-Memory Overlap Resolver
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP Current Anti-Duplication Limit
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP Future Blackboard Ownership
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE Current Baseline Independence
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD AC: Blackboard Boundary
    STATEMENT: The current Memory Management implementation shall not be described as providing a Blackboard coordinator, shared Blackboard schema, posting protocol, task queue, subscription mechanism, or conflict-resolution engine.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT
    16.2. MemoryContextPack Is Not Blackboard
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PACK-NOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: MemoryContextPack shall be described as a run-local typed candidate container and not as a Blackboard implementation.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT
    16.3. SuperPrompt Extras Are Not Blackboard
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-EXTRAS-NOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: SuperPrompt.extras shall be described as runtime auxiliary state and not as a Blackboard merely because multiple components write namespaced values into it.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT
    16.4. Pending Topic State Is Not Blackboard
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-PENDING-NOT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: The ActiveBrief pending-topic buffer shall remain a private continuity state and shall not imply a general shared-agent workspace.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND
    16.5. No Background Coordination Agents
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-BACKGROUND
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: This document shall not claim current background agents that monitor, reconcile, or update memory, knowledge, requirements, architecture, code, or tests.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH
    16.6. No Current Knowledge Graph
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-KNOWLEDGE-GRAPH
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: This document shall not claim a current knowledge graph, graph traversal memory retrieval, graph persistence, or graph-based conflict resolution.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE
    16.7. No Knowledge-Memory Overlap Resolver
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NO-CROSS-CONTEXT-DEDUPE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: The current implementation shall not be described as deterministically comparing final Knowledge Context and Memory Context and removing cross-path overlap.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP
    16.8. Current Anti-Duplication Limit
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-ACTIVEBRIEF-ANTI-DUP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: The current ActiveBrief reference to MemoryMerge may guide the LLM away from repetition inside Memory Context; it shall not be treated as the future cross-path overlap-removal capability.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP
    16.9. Future Blackboard Ownership
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-FUTURE-OWNERSHIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: Any future Blackboard, cross-context reconciliation, knowledge graph, background synchronization, or autonomous coordination capability shall require separately approved requirements and architecture, expected under the future-vision requirement family rather than inferred from this current document.
    GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE
    16.10. Current Baseline Independence
    UID: GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-CURRENT-ACCEPTANCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: Acceptance of the current 50–53 Memory Management baseline shall not depend on implementation of a Blackboard, knowledge graph, background agent, or cross-path overlap resolver.

    17. 17. Traceability and Acceptance Criteria

    STATEMENT: These criteria verify ActiveBrief continuity, deterministic reduction and routing, query-dependent compression, evidence-limited synthesis, and current Blackboard exclusion.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    17.1. Memory Merge Code Ownership
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    RELATIONS (Child):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    STATEMENT: MemorySentenceReducer, MemoryActiveBriefRelevanceGate, MemoryActiveRetrievalBriefBuilder, MemoryCompressor, MemoryMergeSynthesizer, and the associated memory agent JSON definitions shall map to the deepest applicable UIDs in this document.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
    17.2. Sibling Ownership Boundary
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-SIBLING-BOUNDARY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-ROOT Memory Merge, ActiveBrief, and Blackboard Boundary Scope
    STATEMENT: MemoryRecord and file persistence shall remain owned by 51; vector ingestion, candidate retrieval, scoring, and MemoryContextPack construction shall remain owned by 52.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-INIT
    17.3. AC: Initial ActiveBrief
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-INIT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-INIT Initial Brief Route
    STATEMENT: Given a first captured record with reducible Q/A and a successful init agent response, the new record shall contain the returned title/body and contributor list containing only its record_id before .ragmem append.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RELATED
    17.4. AC: Related ActiveBrief Update
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RELATED
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-NORMAL-UPDATE Related ActiveBrief Update Route
    STATEMENT: Given a previous clean brief and current Q/A whose ActiveBrief top-score mean meets threshold, the update agent shall run, contributor IDs shall include the current record, and pending state shall clear.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SKIP
    17.5. AC: Unrelated Q/A Skip
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SKIP
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-SKIP Unrelated Q/A Skip Route
    STATEMENT: Given current Q/A that fails ActiveBrief and pending-topic thresholds, no ActiveBrief LLM call shall run, the previous brief shall be copied, and the current Q/A shall replace pending-topic state.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPIC
    17.6. AC: Confirmed Topic Shift
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPIC
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEROUTE-TOPIC-SHIFT Confirmed Topic-Shift Route
    STATEMENT: Given a pending skipped Q/A and a current Q/A meeting pending_topic_threshold while failing the old ActiveBrief threshold, the update agent payload shall include both labeled Q/A pairs and contributors shall include pending and current record IDs.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-BLACK
    17.7. AC: Black Contributor Exclusion
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-BLACK
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEBRIEF-BLACK-CONTRIBUTOR Reject Brief with Black Contributor
    STATEMENT: Given a previous brief whose contributor is currently Black, the builder shall skip that brief when selecting previous clean continuity state.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-REDUCER
    17.8. AC: Reducer Order and Budget
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-REDUCER
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-REDUCER-ORDER Original Sentence Order Restoration
    STATEMENT: Given over-budget Q/A with multiple windows, selected text shall remain within allocated budgets, redundant windows shall be excluded at threshold, and reconstructed sentences shall follow source order.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPCOUNT
    17.9. AC: Gate Top-Score Counts
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-TOPCOUNT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-ACTIVEGATE-TOP-SELECTION-LARGE Top-Score Selection Above Twenty
    STATEMENT: Gate tests at n equal to 4, 5, 20, 21, and 25 shall use 4, 4, 4, 4, and 5 top scores respectively.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-COMPRESS
    17.10. AC: Query-Anchored Episodic Compression
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-COMPRESS
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-COMPRESSOR-PRESERVE-ORIGINAL Original Episodic Text Preservation
    STATEMENT: Given enabled compression, a non-empty query anchor, and selected episodic candidates, each result shall preserve original Q/A and add query_anchor_episode compressed fields and diagnostics.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNTH-INPUT
    17.11. AC: Current Synthesis Evidence Classes
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNTH-INPUT
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-CURRENT-EVIDENCE-CLASSES Current Synthesized Evidence Classes
    STATEMENT: A synthesis payload shall include bounded episodic and semantic evidence but shall not include working-memory or Direct Recall candidates in memory_evidence under the current implementation.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-EVIDENCE
    17.12. AC: Empty Evidence
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-EVIDENCE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-SYNTH-NO-EVIDENCE No Evidence Skip
    STATEMENT: With no formatted episodic or semantic evidence, no synthesis LLM call shall run and returned memory_context shall be empty with no_memory_evidence diagnostics.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-FAILURE
    17.13. AC: Synthesis Failure
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-FAILURE
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-SYNTHAGENT-FAILURE Synthesis Failure Result
    STATEMENT: When the Memory Context provider call or parse fails, the result shall contain empty memory_context, synthesis_failed diagnostics, and memory_synthesis_llm_skipped true.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-HANDOFF
    17.14. AC: SuperPrompt Memory Handoff
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-HANDOFF
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-SP-TEXT SuperPrompt Memory Context Text
    STATEMENT: After successful memory synthesis, SuperPrompt.memory_context_text shall equal MemoryContextPack.synthesized_memory_context while document stage artifacts remain unchanged.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION
    17.15. AC: Memory Permission
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-PERMISSION
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-PERMISSION Memory Context Permission Dependency
    STATEMENT: When PreProcessing disables memory context, no synthesized memory context shall be rendered in the final SuperPrompt for that request.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY
    17.16. AC: Runtime Artifact Non-Persistence
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-RUNTIME-ONLY
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-HANDOFF-NO-PERSIST No Runtime Context Persistence
    STATEMENT: After a retrieval run, compressed candidate fields and synthesized memory_context shall not appear as rewritten content in existing .ragmem records.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD
    17.17. AC: Blackboard Boundary
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-NO-BLACKBOARD
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-BLACKBOARD-NOT-IMPLEMENTED No Current Blackboard Subsystem
    STATEMENT: Inspection of the current baseline shall not identify MemoryContextPack, SuperPrompt.extras, or pending-topic state as satisfying a Blackboard protocol or shared coordination subsystem.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG
    17.18. AC: Configuration Consumption Truth
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-CONFIG
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGECFG-NO-HIDDEN-OVERRIDE No Hidden Configuration Override
    STATEMENT: Changing a consumed memory transformation setting shall be observable in reduction, route, cap, or diagnostics; an unconsumed or contradictory field shall not be represented as effective without code evidence.
    GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC
    17.19. AC: Requirement-Code Synchronization
    UID: GHOST-MEM-MERGE-AC-SYNC
    STATUS: Draft
    RELATIONS (Parent):
    • GHOST-MEM-MERGE-CODE-OWNERSHIP Memory Merge Code Ownership
    STATEMENT: The 53 baseline shall not be accepted when recording position, reduction behavior, gate route, pending-state lifecycle, contributor trace, synthesis evidence classes, output schema, persistence boundary, or Blackboard status contradicts this document.
    Built with StrictDoc 0.25.0
